controls.title: Risk Analysis
controls.description: Conduct an accurate and thorough assessment of the potential risks and vulnerabilities to the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of ePHI.

controls.title: Authorization and/or Supervision
controls.description: Implement procedures for the authorization and/or supervision of workforce members who work with ePHI.

controls.title: Access Authorization
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures for granting access to ePHI.

controls.title: Log-in Monitoring
controls.description: Procedures for monitoring log-in attempts and reporting discrepancies.

controls.title: Password Management
controls.description: Procedures for creating, changing, and safeguarding passwords.

controls.title: Access Control
controls.description: Implement technical policies and procedures for electronic information systems that maintain ePHI to allow access only to those persons or software programs that have been granted access rights.

controls.title: Encryption and Decryption
controls.description: Implement a mechanism to encrypt and decrypt ePHI.

controls.title: Audit Controls
controls.description: Implement hardware, software, and/or procedural mechanisms that record and examine activity in information systems that contain or use ePHI.

controls.title: Integrity Controls
controls.description: Implement policies and procedures to protect ePHI from improper alteration or destruction.

controls.title: Person or Entity Authentication
controls.description: Implement procedures to verify that a person or entity seeking access to ePHI is the one claimed.

controls.title: Transmission Security
controls.description: Implement technical security measures to guard against unauthorized access to ePHI that is transmitted over an electronic network.

controls.title: Minimum Necessary
controls.description: Reasonable efforts to limit ePHI to the minimum necessary.

controls.title: Information security for use of cloud services
controls.description: Processes for acquisition, use, management and exit from cloud services are established per the organization's security requirements.

controls.title: Privileged access rights
controls.description: Allocation and use of privileged access rights is restricted and managed.

controls.title: Information access restriction
controls.description: Access to information and other associated assets is restricted in line with the access control policy.

controls.title: Access to source code
controls.description: Read and write access to source code, development tools and software libraries is appropriately managed.

controls.title: Secure authentication
controls.description: Secure authentication technologies and procedures are implemented based on access restrictions and the access control policy.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities
controls.description: Information about technical vulnerabilities of systems in use is obtained and exposure to such vulnerabilities is evaluated and addressed.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.description: Configurations, including security configurations, of hardware, software, services and networks are established, documented, implemented, monitored and reviewed.

controls.title: Data leakage prevention
controls.description: Data leakage prevention measures are applied to systems, networks and devices that process, store or transmit sensitive information.

controls.title: Logging
controls.description: Logs that record activities, exceptions, faults and other relevant events are produced, stored, protected and analysed.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.description: Networks, systems and applications are monitored for anomalous behaviour and appropriate actions are taken to evaluate potential security incidents.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.description: Networks and network devices are secured, managed and controlled to protect information in systems and applications.

controls.title: Security of network services
controls.description: Security mechanisms, service levels and service requirements of network services are identified, implemented and monitored.

controls.title: Web filtering
controls.description: Access to external websites is managed to reduce exposure to malicious content.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.description: Rules for the effective use of cryptography, including cryptographic key management, are defined and implemented.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle
controls.description: Rules for the secure development of software and systems are established and applied.

controls.title: Application security requirements
controls.description: Information security requirements are identified, specified and approved when developing or acquiring applications.

controls.title: Secure system architecture and engineering principles
controls.description: Principles for engineering secure systems are established, documented, maintained and applied to system development activities.

controls.title: Secure coding
controls.description: Secure coding principles are applied to software development.

controls.title: Security testing in development and acceptance
controls.description: Security testing processes are defined and implemented in the development life cycle.

controls.title: Separation of development, test and production environments
controls.description: Development, testing and production environments are separated and secured.

controls.title: Shared roles and responsibilities within a cloud computing environment
controls.description: The split of security responsibilities between cloud provider and customer is understood and the customer-side controls are implemented.

controls.title: Segregation in virtual computing environments
controls.description: A cloud customer's virtual environment is segregated from other tenants and from the provider's internal environment.

controls.title: Virtual machine hardening
controls.description: Virtual machines and container images are hardened to meet business and security needs.

controls.title: Administrator's operational security
controls.description: Procedures for administrative operations of a cloud environment are defined and secured.

controls.title: Monitoring of cloud services
controls.description: The cloud customer monitors use of its cloud services and reviews relevant logs and events.

controls.title: Alignment of security management for virtual and physical networks
controls.description: Consistent security management is applied across virtual and physical cloud networks.

controls.title: Use of cryptography and key management in cloud services
controls.description: Cryptography and secret/key material are managed correctly for data stored and transmitted in cloud services.

controls.title: Objectives for responsible development of AI systems
controls.description: Responsible-development objectives (including security of the AI system) are identified and addressed during development.

controls.title: AI system verification and validation
controls.description: AI systems are verified and validated against requirements, including security requirements, before and during use.

controls.title: AI system deployment
controls.description: AI systems are deployed according to defined requirements, with security controls applied to the deployment pipeline and runtime.

controls.title: AI system operation and monitoring
controls.description: AI systems in operation are monitored so anomalous or insecure behaviour can be detected and acted upon.

controls.title: Data for development and enhancement of AI systems
controls.description: Data used to develop and operate AI systems is managed for quality, provenance and protection of sensitive information.

controls.title: Data provenance and quality
controls.description: Provenance and integrity of data used by AI systems is established and maintained.

controls.title: Security of AI systems
controls.description: AI systems are protected against threats specific to them, including prompt injection, model/output manipulation and insecure tool use.

controls.title: Allocation of responsibilities with suppliers and third parties
controls.description: Security responsibilities for third-party AI components, models and dependencies are defined and the supply chain is assessed.

controls.title: Network Security Controls between Trusted and Untrusted Networks
controls.description: Network security controls (NSCs) are implemented between trusted and untrusted networks.

controls.title: Secure Configuration Standards
controls.description: System components are configured and managed securely.

controls.title: Cryptographic Keys are Protected
controls.description: Cryptographic keys used to protect stored account data are protected against disclosure and misuse.

controls.title: Procedures for Cryptographic Keys
controls.description: Procedures and processes for protecting cryptographic keys used to secure stored account data.

controls.title: Strong Cryptography for PAN over Open Networks
controls.description: PAN is protected with strong cryptography during transmission over open, public networks.

controls.title: Software Engineering Techniques to Prevent Common Software Attacks
controls.description: Software engineering techniques or other methods are defined and in use by software development personnel to prevent or mitigate common software attacks.

controls.title: Inventory of Bespoke and Custom Software, Including Third-Party Components
controls.description: An inventory of bespoke and custom software, including third-party components, is maintained.

controls.title: Security Vulnerabilities in Custom Software
controls.description: Security vulnerabilities in custom software are identified and managed.

controls.title: Access to System Components and Data
controls.description: Access to system components and data is appropriately defined and assigned.

controls.title: Authentication Factors are Strong
controls.description: Initial authentication factors meet minimum strength requirements; passwords are protected at rest and in transit.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication for Administrative Access
controls.description: MFA is implemented for all non-console access into the CDE for personnel with administrative access.

controls.title: Audit Logs are Implemented
controls.description: Audit logs are implemented to support the detection of anomalies and suspicious activity, and the forensic analysis of events.

controls.title: Audit Logs are Protected
controls.description: Audit logs are protected from destruction and unauthorized modifications.

controls.title: External and Internal Vulnerabilities are Regularly Identified
controls.description: Vulnerability identification and reporting is automated and routine.

controls.title: Suspected and Confirmed Security Incidents are Responded to Immediately
controls.description: Incident response plan is in place to respond to suspected or confirmed security incidents.

controls.title: Logical and Physical Access Controls
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security software, infrastructure, and architectures over protected information assets.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: The entity implements logical access security measures to protect against threats from sources outside its system boundaries.

controls.title: Restriction of Information Transmission, Movement, and Removal
controls.description: The entity restricts the transmission, movement, and removal of information to authorized internal and external users.

controls.title: Protection Against Malicious Code
controls.description: The entity implements controls to prevent or detect and act upon the introduction of unauthorized or malicious software.

controls.title: Vulnerability Detection and Monitoring
controls.description: The entity uses detection and monitoring procedures to identify changes to configurations that result in vulnerabilities.

controls.title: System Monitoring
controls.description: The entity monitors system components and the operation of those components for anomalies indicative of malicious acts, natural disasters, and errors.

controls.title: Evaluation of Security Events
controls.description: The entity evaluates security events to determine whether they could or have resulted in a failure of the entity to meet its objectives.

controls.title: Security Incident Response
controls.description: The entity responds to identified security incidents by executing a defined incident response program.

controls.title: Change Management
controls.description: The entity authorizes, designs, develops or acquires, configures, documents, tests, approves, and implements changes to infrastructure, data, software, and procedures.

controls.title: Confidentiality of Information
controls.description: The entity identifies and maintains confidential information to meet the entity's objectives related to confidentiality.
